summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Scrabit E-Kabbadiwala frontend updates. All requested features successfully implemented: new hero punchlines, ProcessPoster section with 4 steps, updated testimonials heading, Impact Stats section removed, updated green hero card text, and final CTA. Backend APIs remain fully functional. All navigation and core booking/tracking flows working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend API - All 8 endpoints working (Root, Pricing, Impact, Booking CRUD, Contact, Error handling)
Frontend - Hero section shows new punchlines: 'Grab the Scrap! Kabad Bechna Hua Aasan.' and 'Sahi Daam, Seedha Account Mein'
Frontend - ProcessPoster section with 4 correct steps: 'Aap Book Karo', 'Hum Aayenge', 'Tolo Aur Chhaanto', 'Paisa Lo, Khush Raho'
Frontend - Testimonials heading changed to 'What Our Early Users Say'
Frontend - Impact Stats section successfully REMOVED (no impact-related elements found)
Frontend - Green hero card shows 'Kabad se Azaadi!' instead of '85,000+ KG'
Frontend - Final CTA shows 'Toh Aur Kya Sochna? Grab the Scrap!'
Frontend - Navigation links work correctly (Home, Pricing, Book Pickup, Track)
Frontend - Pricing page loads with all 5 tabs (Paper, Metal, Plastic, E-Waste, Others)
Frontend - Booking flow multi-step process working (scrap selection, weight entry, date/time selection UI)
Frontend - Track page functionality with proper error handling for invalid booking IDs
Integration - Frontend to backend API communication working correctly
Integration - All page transitions and navigation functional
